source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
distilled_thesis: Return in the current route is an enacted re-entry into the human after ripening, not yet the doctrinal surface of eternal return.
